title: It Wont Take Me Long
lyrics: I see you lookin' good by the way you walk I see you lookin' so good, makes your light shine I've been givin' you a golden hue It won't take me long, girl Just have a little drink this year Won't take me long, girl You can tell me yes or no quite quickly Has anybody ever told you you're Like a magnet that makes me fall forward No matter if I wanna repeat past mistakes You're the thing that makes me do better But it won't take me long To tell you all the ways you help me know Won't take me long For me to show you just all the ways you could complete me But we can wait a little second left, not a little second right We're not here to fight, no I know I just talked to you now we just met But maybe you deserve a second round It's not gonna take me long With your heart singin' that song It's not gonna take me long When we're combustin' in the sheets Yeah, I feel so free, I'm flyin' now Thank you for all the days when it Oh, girl, it won't take me long To imagine a future long with happiness It won't take me long Till you've got me inside of you Like my love for kindness Like my shining lining Like the silver that binds us all together Gray matter from the heart is like a red tether And it's not gonna take me long It's not gonna take me long at all To love you like you've never been in love before, baby All this emotional stunt I'm runnin' to you Now I can see that we're right together Even if we just met, imagine that Imagine all this in the span of this total second So just think of what a lover I could be And just think about a better season You'll see that's the line We're gonna pass dead right here all night Oh, baby, it won't take me long To love every second that I'm around you It won't take me long Cause you're dynamite and I'm so glad I met you These eyes are cryin' These eyes have seen a lot of love But they're never gonna see another one like I have with you

lyricsSegments.text: I see you lookin' good by the way you walk
I see you lookin' so good, makes your light shine
I've been givin' you a golden hue
It won't take me long, girl
Just have a little drink this year
Won't take me long, girl
You can tell me yes or no quite quickly
Has anybody ever told you you're
Like a magnet that makes me fall forward
No matter if I wanna repeat past mistakes
You're the thing that makes me do better
But it won't take me long
To tell you all the ways you help me know
Won't take me long
For me to show you just all the ways you could complete me
But we can wait a little second left, not a little second right
We're not here to fight, no
I know I just talked to you now we just met
But maybe you deserve a second round
It's not gonna take me long
With your heart singin' that song
It's not gonna take me long
When we're combustin' in the sheets
Yeah, I feel so free, I'm flyin' now
Thank you for all the days when it
Oh, girl, it won't take me long
To imagine a future long with happiness
It won't take me long
Till you've got me inside of you
Like my love for kindness
Like my shining lining
Like the silver that binds us all together
Gray matter from the heart is like a red tether
And it's not gonna take me long
It's not gonna take me long at all
To love you like you've never been in love before, baby
All this emotional stunt I'm runnin' to you
Now I can see that we're right together
Even if we just met, imagine that
Imagine all this in the span of this total second
So just think of what a lover I could be
And just think about a better season
You'll see that's the line
We're gonna pass dead right here all night
Oh, baby, it won't take me long
To love every second that I'm around you
It won't take me long
Cause you're dynamite and I'm so glad I met you
These eyes are cryin'
These eyes have seen a lot of love
But they're never gonna see another one like I have with you
